items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 官方确认收到美国政府出口管制指令，被要求全面暂停 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 两个模型的访问权限。这是区域性合规强制事件，所有调用方即刻失去这两个模型入口，需立即在代码与配置中移除对它们的引用并切换替代模型。
items.backend_focus: 紧急行动：在所有使用 Claude 系列模型的服务中，立即将 model 字段从 fable-5/mythos-5 改为已开放的等价档位（按 token 量级与能力就近匹配 Sonnet/Opus 当前可用版本）；同时检查 API key 路由与代理层是否仍指向被封禁模型，避免 SDK 客户端缓存导致 403/区域错误。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glas...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布《Introducing Claude Tag》产品公告，介绍 Claude Tag 作为团队与 Claude 协作的新方式，配套推出 Policy on the AI Exponential 政策提案、Claude Corps 奖学金与 Project Glasswing 扩展。其中 Claude Tag 是面向团队协作的产品功能，其余三项属于公司公告。
items.backend_focus: 关注 Claude Tag 的 API/SDK 是否提供独立的 team-scoped endpoint 或需在现有 Messages API 请求中加 tag/team_id 字段（具体字段名以官方 docs 为准）；评估是否需要在计费与权限层做 group 维度的拆分。

Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Produ...
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 正式启动 Claude Corps 全国奖学金项目，面向早期职业者推广 AI 在美国各社区的应用。这是人才与品牌项目，不涉及模型版本、API 字段、SDK 或定价变化。
items.backend_focus: 无（人才品牌项目）。与后端工程无关，无需任何代码或配置改动。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 宣布将 Project Glasswing 扩展至 15+ 国家的约 150 个新组织。这是企业合作与公益拓展公告，未涉及新模型、API 或 SDK 变更。
items.backend_focus: 无（企业合作公告）。若企业恰好是 Project Glasswing 受邀组织，可关注后续 Claude 配额与功能试点机会，否则无需任何代码改动。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 正式发布 Claude Opus 4.8，作为 Opus 系列升级，重点提升 coding、agentic 与专业工作任务能力。这是 Opus 4 系列的小版本号跃迁，调用方可在 API 中将 model 字段切换到 claude-opus-4-8 以获得更强 agent 表现；旧 Opus 4.x 预计保持一段时间但需关注 deprecation 时间线。
items.backend_focus: 升级方式：在 Anthropic Messages API 调用中将 model 字段改为 claude-opus-4-8，优先在 agent/coding 负载上做 A/B 对照；同时复查 max_tokens、context window 是否相对 Opus 4.5 有变化（以官方 model card 为准），并关注 Anthropic 公布的 Opus 4.5 退役日期，避免延迟切换导致服务中断。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 开设首尔办公室并宣布与韩国 AI 生态的多项新合作。属于区域扩张与渠道伙伴关系公告，意味着 Claude 在韩国区域的可用性与企业落地将增强，但未发布新模型或 API 字段变更。
items.backend_focus: 无（区域扩张公告）。若服务部署在韩国区域或面向韩国用户，可关注 Anthropic 是否为该区域开放新的数据驻留/inference endpoint 与更低延迟路由；当前无需 API/SDK 代码改动。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 发布首期 Anthropic Public Record 报告，属于公司层面的透明度与治理披露，未涉及具体模型版本、API 字段、SDK 或定价变化。
items.backend_focus: 无（公司透明度报告）。与工程无关，无需任何代码或配置改动。

items.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 与 TCS 达成合作，将 Claude 引入受监管行业（金融、医疗等）。属于企业渠道与合规合作公告，未涉及新模型发布、API 字段变更、SDK 更新或定价调整。
items.backend_focus: 无（企业合作公告）。若企业受 TCS 服务，可关注后续由 TCS 集成的 Claude 解决方案的合规审计报告；但当前无需任何 API/SDK 代码改动。

items.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 与 DXC 达成联盟，将 Claude 集成到银行、航空等受监管行业依赖的核心系统中。这是企业渠道与合规合作公告，未涉及新模型、API 字段、SDK 或定价变化。
items.backend_focus: 无（企业合作公告）。与 DXC 集成的受监管行业客户可关注 Claude 合规审计报告，但当前无需任何代码或配置改动。
